mnemonics: TRYCATCH - Think 'Try' to run code, 'Catch' errors before they crash your program
keyPoints: try block contains code that might throw an exception
catch block handles the exception if one occurs
Multiple catch blocks can handle different exception types
Exceptions are objects that contain error information
commonMistakes: Catching Exception instead of specific exception types
Forgetting to close resources in finally block
Using empty catch blocks that swallow exceptions
Not providing meaningful error messages in catch blocks
